startPoint.en: Speak to Orlando Smith, excavating west of the Legends' Guild, south of Sorcerer's Tower.
startPoint.es: Habla con Orlando Smith, excavando al oeste del Legends' Guild, al sur de Sorcerer's Tower.

children.title: Ability to enter the Warriors' Guild
A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen
A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains…
children.matchTitle: A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains

recommended.name: Combat level
recommended.display: 100 combat level, it is recommended that you have balanced combat stats at around level 70 each.

recommended.name: Monkfish
recommended.display: Food (Monkfish or a higher tier food is recommended), weapons and armour

recommended.name: Yew logs
recommended.display: Yew logs or better for a bonfire boost

recommended.name: Potions
recommended.display: Combat boosting potions (e.g. super ranging potion or super magic potion)

recommended.name: Prayer points
recommended.display: Prayer-restoring potions (e.g. prayer potion or super restore)

rewards.display: 3 quest points
3 ancient lamps granting 100,000 experience in three different skills at or above level 75 (you may destroy them and get them back from the High Druid)
3 static lamps granting 50,000 experience each in any combat skill at or above level 65 (you may destroy them and get them back from the High Druid)
Glossy lamp granting 110,000 experience, requiring 70 (if you do not have 70 , you can destroy it and get it back from the High Druid)
Pale lamp granting 250,000 experience, requiring 80 (if you do not have 80 , you can destroy it and get it back from the High Druid)

rewards.name: 4 new ultimate combat abilities
rewards.display: 4 new ultimate combat abilities

rewards.name: Juna's Gift
rewards.display: Juna's Gift, Azzanadra's Gift, or Zilyana's Gift (may be changed to either of the three versions for free after the quest by talking to the High Druid)
Access to Guthixian ruins, where you can offer chronicle fragments for Divination experience

rewards.name: Naragun
rewards.display: Access to the memory of Naragun using fairy ring with code AIS

rewards.name: Bird of Prey
rewards.display: Bird of Prey (When Zilyana, Kree and K'ril arrive)

rewards.name: Boulder and Brighter
rewards.display: Boulder and Brighter (When beginning the large puzzle)

rewards.name: Chamber of Guthix
rewards.display: Chamber of Guthix (In the central chamber)

rewards.name: Defenders of Guthix I
rewards.display: Defenders of Guthix I

rewards.name: Defenders of Guthix II
rewards.display: Defenders of Guthix II

rewards.name: End Song
rewards.display: End Song

rewards.name: Guthix's Warning
rewards.display: Guthix's Warning (During the cutscene with Sliske in the Shadow Realm)

rewards.name: Invaders Must Die I
rewards.display: Invaders Must Die I (When Graardor arrives)

rewards.name: Invaders Must Die II
rewards.display: Invaders Must Die II (When Zemouregal arrives)

rewards.name: Invaders Must Die III
rewards.display: Invaders Must Die III (When K'ril arrives for the second time)

rewards.name: Memories of Guthix
rewards.display: Memories of Guthix (In Guthix's memories of his homeworld)

rewards.name: Temple of Guthix I
rewards.display: Temple of Guthix I

rewards.name: Temple of Guthix II
rewards.display: Temple of Guthix II

postQuest.display: The ability to 'pay respects' at the shrine near where Guthix died, to receive 100,000 experience. Doing so requires level 90 .

The ability to light the five torches around the shrine, yielding 10,000 experience each, for a total of 50,000 experience. Doing so requires 74 . The fifth torch is located on the platform below the other four torches. This experience is not affected by experience boosting items like the flame gloves and the ring of fire.

postQuest.name: Chronicle fragment
postQuest.display: Offering 100 Chronicle fragments at the shrine will unlock the [Name] of Guthix title.

postQuest.name: Ritual of the Mahjarrat
postQuest.display: Certain additional rewards are available if additional quests are completed: Ritual of the Mahjarrat, The Firemaker's Curse, The Branches of Darkmeyer, The Void Stares Back, and The Chosen Commander:

children.name: Sixth-Age circuit
children.display: The Sixth-Age circuit, given to players by the Guthixian High Druid

children.name: The World Guardian
children.display: [Name], the World Guardian title, which can be obtained by talking to the Guthixian High Druid.

children.name: Automaton
children.display: Access to automaton area and automatons as a Slayer assignment (also requiring 67 ).

postQuest.name: Azzanadra
postQuest.display: Additional dialogue with Azzanadra, Juna, Thaerisk Cemphier (or Ivy Sophista if Thaerisk dies), Fiara (or Coulson), Chaeldar, Char, and Ali the Wise.

postQuest.name: Relic powers
postQuest.display: One of several requirements to unlock two relic powers:

text.en: Gear and food for fights.
text.es: Equipo y comida para los combates.

text.en: Talk to Orlando Smith, West of the Legends' Guild (fairy code BLR, or use the Ardougne lodestone).
text.es: Habla con Orlando Smith, al oeste del Legends' Guild (código de hada BLR, o usa la lodestone de Ardougne).

chatOptions: 1 So you just need me to open the doors?

text.en: Open the door.
text.es: Abre la puerta.

text.en: Investigate the following 6 artefacts:
text.es: Investiga los siguientes 6 artefactos:

text.en: Inactive obelisk (north-west)
text.es: Obelisco inactivo (noroeste)

text.en: Stone carvings (north)
text.es: Tallas de piedra (norte)

text.en: The other stone carvings (north-east)
text.es: Las otras tallas de piedra (noreste)

text.en: Clouded vials (north-east)
text.es: Viales nublados (noreste)

text.en: Dusty parchment (south-east)
text.es: Pergamino polvoriento (sureste)

text.en: Shattered blade (south)
text.es: Hoja destrozada (sur)

text.en: Investigate the Guthixian statue to the east.
text.es: Investiga la estatua Guthixiana al este.

text.en: Enter the next room to the east and kill the 3 automatons.
text.es: Entra en la siguiente sala al este y mata a los 3 automatons.

text.en: You must finish the entire dialogue with the Automatons before clicking to attack them (there's a small break in the dialogue) or you will have to redo the cutscene again.
text.es: Debes terminar todo el diálogo con los Automatons antes de hacer clic para atacarlos (hay una pequeña pausa en el diálogo) o tendrás que rehacer la escena de nuevo.

text.en: Warning: Automatons can deal high damage to players standing within their special attack range. Lower-level players should use ranged, magic, or necromancy to attack them.
text.es: Advertencia: Los Automatons pueden infligir mucho daño a los jugadores que estén dentro del rango de su ataque especial. Los jugadores de nivel más bajo deberían usar distancia, magia o nigromancia para atacarlos.

text.en: Talk to Sliske.
text.es: Habla con Sliske.

chatOptions: 3 I, [Player], stand before you! Do your worst!

text.en: Continue talking to Sliske after the cutscene.
text.es: Continúa hablando con Sliske después de la escena.

chatOptions: 1 What do you gain from telling me this?
2 So how do I come into this?

text.en: If Kree'arra and Commander Zilyana don't spawn, talk to Sliske again.
text.es: Si Kree'arra y Commander Zilyana no aparecen, habla con Sliske de nuevo.

text.en: After the cutscenes, talk to Kree'arra.
text.es: Después de las escenas, habla con Kree'arra.

chatOptions: 3 Why are you following Zilyana, then?
3 If you want to get rid of me, you'll have to do it the hard way.

text.en: Defeat Kree'arra. Avoid standing on the tornadoes.
text.es: Derrota a Kree'arra. Evita quedarte de pie sobre los tornados.

text.en: Pass through the door (east).
text.es: Pasa por la puerta (este).

text.en: Run to the other side of the room and activate the control panel.
text.es: Corre hacia el otro lado de la sala y activa el panel de control.

chatOptions: 1 Guthix is in trouble. I'm here to protect him.

text.en: While using the control panel you can release a boulder by clicking on the dispenser in the corner of the screen. The goal is to get the boulder from the dispenser to the receptacle tile (circular cavity with a green dot).
text.es: Mientras usas el panel de control puedes soltar una roca haciendo clic en el dispensador en la esquina de la pantalla. El objetivo es llevar la roca desde el dispensador hasta la baldosa receptáculo (cavidad circular con un punto verde).

text.en: To solve the puzzle:
text.es: Para resolver el puzle:

text.en: Rotate the tracks to create a path from the dispenser to the green hole, matching the solutions below (NOTE: puzzle can crash based on camera settings try classic)
text.es: Gira las vías para crear un camino desde el dispensador hasta el agujero verde, siguiendo las soluciones de abajo (NOTA: el puzle puede fallar según la configuración de la cámara, prueba con classic)

text.en: Click the appropriate dispenser to release the boulder
text.es: Haz clic en el dispensador correspondiente para soltar la roca

text.en: When the boulder halts at a gate, wait for the next tile to auto-rotate such that the path continues, and click the gates to release the boulder at the right time
text.es: Cuando la roca se detenga en una puerta, espera a que la siguiente baldosa gire automáticamente de forma que el camino continúe, y haz clic en las puertas para soltar la roca en el momento adecuado

images.caption: The solution to the first puzzle. Click the top-right dispenser.
The solution to the second puzzle. Click the bottom-right dispenser.
The solution to the third puzzle. Click the top-left dispenser.
The solution to the fourth puzzle. Click the bottom-left dispenser.

text.en: After the cutscenes (skippable), view the strange map to the east.
text.es: Después de las escenas (que se pueden omitir), mira el extraño mapa al este.

text.en: Answer four randomised questions to balance the pillars (Chaos, Order, Good, and Evil must all be exactly 50%). Refer to the below table and pick the appropriate answers:
text.es: Responde cuatro preguntas aleatorias para equilibrar los pilares (Caos, Orden, Bien y Mal deben estar todos exactamente al 50%). Consulta la tabla de abajo y elige las respuestas apropiadas:

text.en: Give the group a motivational speech
text.es: Da al grupo un discurso motivacional

chatOptions: 1 Reinforce the importance of protecting the edicts.
1 Highlight the strengths of the group.

text.en: Drag the guardian icons to the correct threat based on the hover text in the top row:
text.es: Arrastra los iconos de los guardianes a la amenaza correcta según el texto emergente en la fila superior:

rows.text: Whoever is coming through this wing is very big and slow. It sounds like they are using their immense strength to force their way through the rock. Perhaps they don't have the intelligence to try any other way.

It sounds like there are a lot of enemies breaking through here, and the foul stench of the undead can be smelled. Whoever is leading these troops must have an immense talent to undermine death itself.

This enemy sounds large, slow and heavy, but they are using more than their strength to break through. The impact of magic can be heard alongside demonic chanting, so they must have some intelligence.

Whoever is coming through here sounds small and nimble. They seem to be using only magic, so it could be assumed they'll have a high resistance to magic used against them. Their attacks sound extremely aggressive, as if they're beyond determined.

text.en: Talk to Juna.
text.es: Habla con Juna.

chatOptions: 1 I'm happy with the formation for now.

text.en: Finish the dialogue after the cutscene (including a pause in dialogue) or you will be forced to watch it again.
text.es: Termina el diálogo después de la escena (incluyendo una pausa en el diálogo) o serás obligado a verla de nuevo.

text.en: Drink from the elixirs if you need to restore your health or prayer.
text.es: Bebe de los elixires si necesitas restaurar tu salud u oración.

text.en: Note: you can bank if you talk to Druidess. Look for the bank icon on the minimap.
text.es: Nota: puedes usar el banco si hablas con Druidess. Busca el icono del banco en el minimapa.

text.en: Enter the north-west storage wing guarded by Chaeldar and Thaerisk Cemphier.
text.es: Entra en el ala de almacenamiento noroeste, custodiada por Chaeldar y Thaerisk Cemphier.

text.en: Defeat General Graardor. Protect from Melee is preferred.
text.es: Derrota a General Graardor. Se prefiere Protect from Melee.

text.en: Enter the exit.
text.es: Entra por la salida.

text.en: Enter the north storage wing guarded by Cres.
text.es: Entra en el ala de almacenamiento norte, custodiada por Cres.

text.en: Defeat Zemouregal. Bringing Antipoison is recommended.
text.es: Derrota a Zemouregal. Se recomienda llevar Antipoison.

text.en: Enter the exit.
text.es: Entra por la salida.

text.en: Enter the south-west storage wing guarded by Death.
text.es: Entra en el ala de almacenamiento suroeste, custodiada por Death.

text.en: Defeat K'ril Tsutsaroth. Be aware of his special attacks.
text.es: Derrota a K'ril Tsutsaroth. Ten cuidado con sus ataques especiales.

text.en: Enter the exit.
text.es: Entra por la salida.

text.en: Enter the south storage wing guarded by Fiara and Valluta.
text.es: Entra en el ala de almacenamiento sur, custodiada por Fiara y Valluta.

text.en: Defeat Enakhra.
text.es: Derrota a Enakhra.

text.en: Enter the exit.
text.es: Entra por la salida.

text.en: Talk to Cres in the center.
text.es: Habla con Cres en el centro.

text.en: Talk to Juna in the east.
text.es: Habla con Juna en el este.

text.en: Defend Juna from the spiritual enemies for 2 minutes.
text.es: Defiende a Juna de los enemigos espirituales durante 2 minutos.

text.en: Talk to Azzanadra after the skippable cutscene.
text.es: Habla con Azzanadra después de la escena (que se puede omitir).

text.en: Enter the shattered wall.
text.es: Entra por el muro destrozado.

text.en: Run down the path, avoiding the boulders and flames. If you get trapped between ice spikes, click them to break free.
text.es: Corre por el camino, evitando las rocas y las llamas. Si quedas atrapado entre picos de hielo, haz clic en ellos para liberarte.

text.en: After the skippable cutscene, walk east down to the pedestal in front of Guthix. He will teleport you.
text.es: Después de la escena (que se puede omitir), camina hacia el este hasta el pedestal frente a Guthix. Él te teletransportará.

text.en: Walk between the islands, talking to Guthix along the way.
text.es: Camina entre las islas, hablando con Guthix por el camino.

text.en: On your return, talk to one of the guardians.
text.es: A tu regreso, habla con uno de los guardianes.

text.en: After a skippable cutscene, Saradomin will appear in front of you. Talk to him.
text.es: Después de una escena (que se puede omitir), Saradomin aparecerá frente a ti. Habla con él.

text.en: Talk to Juna (10 free inventory slots are required).
text.es: Habla con Juna (se requieren 10 espacios libres en el inventario).

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
